creator: gustau.perez@gmail.com
text:
I tested it with gnome 2.32 under FreeBSD gusiport 
9.0-CURRENT-201011, didn't test it under xfce. I checked the files 
installed by they remove clean. The ports sets the PORTREVISION to 0, 
portlint complais about this, so I'm attaching a simple  modification 
that removes this issue.

    For the rest, it does fine for so I would approve it.

    Thanks for the patch.

    Gustau
